name: Hotel Seagull
current_rate_note: Rates rise 40-50% during peak winter season (Nov–Feb). Walk-in rates often cheaper than quoted.
booking_note: Walk-in available; call ahead during peak season (Nov–Feb)
highlights: 5 minutes walk to Laboni Beach; affordable beachside comfort

name: Long Beach Hotel
current_rate_note: Sea-view rooms command a ₹1,500 premium over garden-view. Book 2 weeks ahead for winter.
booking_note: Online and walk-in. Book 2 weeks ahead in winter season.
highlights: Direct beach access; sea-facing rooms available

name: Ocean Paradise Hotel & Resort
current_rate_note: Deluxe sea-view suite currently ₹18,500/night (Jan 2025). Weekend rates 20% higher.
booking_note: Advance booking required. Available on major booking platforms.
highlights: Largest pool in Cox's Bazar; premium beachfront location

name: Sajek Hill View Homestay
current_rate_note: Rates include all 3 meals. Peak season (Oct–Jan) fully booked 2 weeks ahead — reserve early.
booking_note: Book 3–5 days ahead via phone. No online booking.
highlights: Hosted by indigenous Chakma family; authentic local food & cultural stories

name: Sajek Resort
current_rate_note: Cottage with valley view costs ₹4,200/night in peak season. Off-season discounts up to 35%.
booking_note: Phone or in-person booking. Very popular; book 1 week ahead.
highlights: Panoramic valley view; cloud sea visible from room terraces

name: Marma Tribal Homestay
current_rate_note: Rate includes traditional breakfast and dinner. No extra charges for guided village tour.
booking_note: Contact via local guide networks. Limited availability.
highlights: Authentic Marma tribal experience; bamboo-built cottage with mountain views

name: Nilgiri Hotel
current_rate_note: Managed by Bangladesh Army. Current rate ₹5,500/night (Dec–Feb peak). Must book via official website.
booking_note: Managed by Bangladesh Army. Book via official channels.
highlights: Highest hotel in Bangladesh at 2,200 ft; above the clouds in winter mornings

name: Tea Garden Guesthouse
current_rate_note: Rates include morning tea tasting. Spring season (Mar–Apr) sees 30% premium for garden bloom views.
booking_note: Walk-in welcome off-season; call ahead in spring.
highlights: Wake up to misty tea gardens; free morning tea tasting

name: Rose View Hotel
current_rate_note: Best city hotel in Sylhet. Current rate ₹3,500/night standard room. Airport pickup ₹500 extra.
booking_note: Available on Booking.com and direct call.
highlights: Central location; best hotel in Sylhet city for comfort

name: Sundarbans River Houseboat
current_rate_note: Rate is per person and includes all meals, guide, and forest entry permit. Prices firm — no bargaining.
booking_note: Must book as part of a tour package; includes forest permit.
highlights: Sleep on the river inside the tiger reserve; unforgettable wildlife experience

name: Lub d Bangkok Silom
current_rate_note: Dorm bed ₹1,000/night; private pod room ₹2,100/night. December–February peak: book 10+ days ahead.
booking_note: Book via Hostelworld or direct website.
highlights: Bangkok's top-rated hostel; vibrant social scene with rooftop bar

name: Amari Phuket
current_rate_note: Current rate ₹5,500/night for sea-view room. High season (Dec–Jan) rates 40% higher. Agoda often cheapest.
booking_note: Book on Booking.com or Agoda for best rates.
highlights: Hillside resort with stunning Andaman Sea views; direct beach access

name: Campuhan Ridge Guesthouse
current_rate_note: Breakfast included. July–Aug peak season (Bali) can triple rates. Book direct for 10% discount.
highlights: Stunning rice terrace views; free breakfast with local Balinese dishes

name: The Layar Private Villas
current_rate_note: 1-bedroom villa starts at ₹21,000/night (low season). Minimum 3-night stay. 2025 Christmas/NYE rates: ₹55,000+.
highlights: Secluded private villa with infinity pool; dedicated butler service

name: Rove Downtown Dubai
current_rate_note: Current rate ₹5,200/night standard room (Jan 2025). Rates spike during Dubai Shopping Festival (Jan) and NYE.
booking_note: Book on Booking.com. Good value for Downtown location.
highlights: Rooftop pool with Burj Khalifa view; walking distance to Dubai Mall

name: Hotel Thamel Inn
current_rate_note: Trekking season (Oct–Nov, Mar–May) doubles rates. Book ahead during peak trekking months.
booking_note: Walk-in or Booking.com. Thamel is the trekker hub.
highlights: Heart of Thamel; gear rentals and trek permits arranged on-site
